listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee's Sale 119 SALMON STREET, MARTINSVILLE, VA 24112 (Parcel ID: 000619000) Default having been made in the terms of a certain Deed of Trust dated 8/26/2010, in the original principal amount of $103,626.00 and recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the Martinsville County, Virginia on 8/27/2010, as Instrument No. 1000898, Under Loan Modification Recorded 04/01/2019 Clerk File Number: 190000345, the undersigned Substitute Trustees will sell at public auction on 5/20/2026 at 1:45 PM, At the front steps of the courthouse 55 W. Church Street Martinsville, VA 24112, the property designated as 119 SALMON STREET, MARTINSVILLE, VA 24112. Lot #6, Block Z of the Cabel Acres Development as shown on a survey for George C. Salmons, Jr., et als, prepared by J. A. Gustin and W. C. Trent, Surveyors, dated November 2O, 1950, and re-surveyed by H. S. Pierce which said map is of record in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the City of Martinsville, Virginia in Map Book 2, page 214, and being further shown on Plat of Survey for John B. Williams and Margaret E. Williams, prepared by J. A. Gustin & Associates, dated October 15, 1979, and of record in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Map Book 14, page 219, which said lot is more particularly described as follow, to-wit: BEGINNING at a point on the East side of Salmons Street, which point marks the dividing line between Lots #5 and #6 and running from said beginning point and with said dividing line, North 72 deg. 56 min. East 150 feet to a point on a common back line for a tier of lots; thence with said back line, South 17 deg. 04 min. East 70 feet to a point, which point marks the dividing line between Lots #6 and #7; thence with the last mentioned dividing line, South 72 deg. 56 min. West 150 feet to a point on the East side of Salmons Street, thence with the margin of said Salmons Street North 70 deg. 04 min. West 70 feet to the point of beginning; and being more commonly known as 119 Salmon Street, Martinsville, Virginia in accordance with the numbering system currently utilized by the City of Martinsville; TERMS: CASH. A deposit of $10,362.60 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successful bidder at time of sale. Prior to the sale, interested bidders will be required to register with and must present a bid deposit which may be held during the sale by the trustee. The bid deposit must be certified funds and/or cash, but no more than $9,900.00 of cash will be accepted. The successful bidder's deposit will be retained at the sale and applied to the sale price. If held by the trustee, all other bid deposits will be returned to the unsuccessful bidders. Settlement is to be made within 15 days. The successful bidder will be responsible for obtaining possession of the property, and for all costs and fees related to recording the Trustee's Deed, including the grantors tax. The successful bidder will be required to execute a Memorandum of Trustee's Sale, available for review upon request before the sale, outlining additional terms of sale and settlement. A Trustee's Deed will be prepared by Trustee's attorney at high bidder's expense. This is a communication from a debt collector. Vylla Solutions - Virginia, LLC, 283 Constitution Drive, Suite 102, Office B, Virginia Beach, VA 23462, File No. 24-32314, Tel: 888-313-1969 COL-4800478 CITY OF MARTINSVILLE COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-07

Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE’S SALE OF 245 LAUREL DRIVE, MARTINSVILLE, VA 24112 In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated February 13, 2023, in the original principal amount of $139,428.00 recorded in the Clerk’s Office, Circuit Court for Henry County, Virginia as Instrument No. 230000583. M. BARNARD, CLS, DATED AUGUST, 1968, OF RECORD IN THE HENRY COUNTY CIRCUIT COURT CLERK`S OFFICE IN MAP BOOK 25, PAGE 33, AND ALSO SHOWN ON PLAT OF SURVEY FOR BAILEY G. PENN, PREPARED BY J. A. GUSTIN & ASSOCIATES ON OCTOBER 16, 1980. RECORDED IN THE HENRY COUNTY CIRCUIT COURT CLERK`S OFFICE IN MAP BOOK 75, PAGE 36, DESCRIBED AS; BEGINNING AT A POINT ON THE NORTHEAST SIDE OF LAUREL DRIVE (ALSO KNOWN AS STATE ROUTE 932) WHICH POINT IS .3 MILE FROM DOGWOOD ROAD (ST. RT. 930); THENCE WITH SAID LAUREL DRIVE, N. 57 DEG. 02 MIN. W. 100 FEET TO AN IRON PIPE IN THE DIVIDING LINE OF LOTS 27 AND 28; THENCE WITH SAID DIVIDING LINE, N, 32 DEG. 58 MIN. E. 175.00 FEET TO AN IRON PIPE FOUND IN THE BACK LINE OF LOT 28; THENCE WITH SAID BACK LINE. S. 57 DEG. 02 MIN. E. 100 FEET TO AN IRON PIPE FOUND IN THE DIVIDING LINE OF LOTS 28 AND 29; THENCE WITH SAID DIVIDING LINE, S. 32 DEG. 58 MIN. W. 175.00 FEET TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING, BEING ALL OF LOT 28 AS SHOWN ON SAID MAP. SECOND: LOT NO. 28A SITUATED TO THE REAR OF LOT 28 ABOVE DESCRIBED AND DESCRIBED AS FOLLOWS: ALL THAT CERTAIN LOT OR PARCEL OF LAND LYING OFF LAUREL DRIVE (ST. RT. 932) IN THE IRISWOOD DISTRICT OF HENRY COUNTY, VIRGINIA, AND BEING LOT 28A AS SHOWN O PLAT FOR B. I. ATKINS, R. G. ATKINS AND C. E. SCOTT, TRUSTEES, AS PREPARED BY MARVIN E. SCEARCE, CLS, ON FEBRUARY 23, 1981 AND RECORDED IN THE HENRY COUNTY CIRCUIT COURT CLERK`S OFFICE IN MAP BOOK 76, PAGE 81 (ERRONEOUSLY SHOWN AS MAP BOOK 77, PAGE 36 IN SOURCE DEED) DESCRIBED AS: BEGINNING AT THE REAR DIVIDING LINE BETWEEN LOTS 28 AND 29 OF SAID SURVEY, WHICH POINT IS NORTH 32 DEGREES 58 MINUTES EAST 175 FEET FROM THE NORTHEAST SIDE OF LAUREL DRIVE; THENCE, NORTH 57 DEGREES 03 MINUTES WEST 49.99 FEET TO AN IRON; THENCE, NORTH 33 DEGREES 01 MINUTE EAST 125.13 FEET TO AN IRON IN THE OUTSIDE LINE; THENCE, SOUTH 57 DEGREES 30 MINUTES EAST 138.80 FEET TO AN IRON; THENCE, SOUTH 15 DEGREES 59 MINUTES WEST 37.87 FEET TO AN IRON; THENCE, NORTH 57 DEGREES 03 MINUTES WEST 100 FEET TO AN IRON; THENCE, SOUTH 32 DEGREES 57 MINUTES WEST 90 FEET TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING, BEING ALL OF LOT 28A. THIRD: LOT NO. 28B SITUATED TO THE REAR OF LOT 28 OF THE LAUREL PARK DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SUBDIVISION AS PREPARED BY A. M, BARNARD. CLS, ON AUGUST 1, 1963, AND RECORDED IN THE HENRY COUNTY CIRCUIT COURT CLERK`S, OFFICE IN MAP BOOK 25, PAGE 33, AND LYING OFF OF LAUREL DRIVE (ROUTE 932) IN THE IRISWOOD DISTRICT OF HENRY COUNTY, VIRGINIA, AND BEING LOL 38B AS SHOWN ON PLAT FOR B. I. ATKINS, R. G. ATKINS AND C. E. SCOTT, TRUSTEES, AS PREPARED BY MARVIN E. SCEARCE, CLS ON FEBRUARY 28, 1981, (NOT RECORDED), AND DESCRIBED AS FOLLOWS: BEGINNING AT THE REAR DIVIDING JINE BETWEEN LOTS 28 AND 29; THENCE NORTH 57 DEGREES 03 MINUTES WEST 50.03 FEET; THENCE NORTH 33 DEGREES 01 MINUTES EAST 125.14 FEET TO AN IRON IN THE OUTSIDE LINE: THENCE, SOUTH 57 DEGREES 02 MINUTES EAST 50.03 FEET TO AN IRON; (HENCE, SOUTH 33 DEGREES 01 MINUTE WEST 125.13 FEET TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING, AND BEING AL OF LOT 28B. TERMS OF SALE: ALL CASH. A bidder’s deposit of ten percent (10%) of the sale price or ten percent (10%) of the original principal balance of the subject Deed of Trust, whichever is lower, in the form of cash or certified funds payable to the Substitute Trustee must be present at the time of the sale. The balance of the purchase price will be due within fifteen (15) days of sale, otherwise Purchaser’s deposit may be forfeited to Trustee. Time is of the essence. If the sale is set aside for any reason, the Purchaser at the sale shall be entitled to a return of the deposit paid. The Purchaser may, if provided by the terms of the Trustee’s Memorandum of Foreclosure Sale, be entitled to a $50 cancellation fee from the Substitute Trustee, but shall have no further recourse against the Mortgagor, the Mortgagee or the Mortgagee’s attorney. A form copy of the Trustee’s memorandum of foreclosure sale and contract to purchase real property is available for viewing at www.aldridgepite.com. Additi

listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee's Sale 328 Joseph Martin Highway, Martinsville, Virginia 24112 (Account No.: 172010000; Tax Map No.: 52.4(017 )000 /001) Default having been made in the terms of a certain Deed of Trust dated September 20, 2018, in the original principal amount of $78,551.00 and recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the County of Henry, Virginia in Instrument No. 180003279, the undersigned Substitute Trustees will sell at public auction on June 1, 2026, at 10:00 AM in front of the building housing the Henry County Circuit Court, 3160 Kings Mountain Road, Martinsville, VA 24112, the property shown in “plat of survey for William K. Perry showing property situated on the Northwest side of the Joseph Martin Highway and on the East side of Finley Drive, Ridgeway District, Henry County, Virginia”, prepared by J.A. Gustin & Associates, CE & CLS, dated March 6, 1973, being Lot 1, more particularly described as: Beginning at an iron pin located on the Northwest side of Joseph Martin Highway at the corner of Lots 1 and 2; thence with said Highway S. 38 deg. 20` W 115.80 feet to an iron pin; thence along Finley Drive N 39 deg. 21` W 47.75 feet to an iron pin; thence N 16 deg. 20` W 182.70 feet to an iron pin; thence a new line S 51 deg. 40`E 195.74 feet to the point of beginning, being all of Lot 1. Sale is subject to all prior liens, easements, restrictions, covenants, and conditions, if any, of record, or other matters which would be disclosed by an accurate survey or inspection of the premises. TERMS: CASH. A deposit of $8,000.00 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successful bidder at time of sale. Prior to the sale, interested bidders will be required to register with and must present a bid deposit which may be held during the sale by the trustee. The bid deposit must be certified funds and/or cash, but no more than $9,900.00 of cash will be accepted. The successful bidder’s deposit will be retained at the sale and applied to the sale price. If held by the trustee, all other bid deposits will be returned to the unsuccessful bidders. Settlement is to be made within 15 calendar days. The successful bidder will be responsible for obtaining possession of the property, and for all costs and fees related to recording the Trustee’s Deed, including the grantors tax. The successful bidder will be required to execute a Memorandum of Trustee's Sale, available for review on the Foreclosure Sales page of www.glasserlaw.com, outlining additional terms of sale and settlement. A Trustee’s Deed will be prepared by Trustee’s attorney at high bidder’s expense. This is a communication from a debt collector, Glasser and Glasser, P.L.C. on behalf of Atlantic Trustee Services, L.L.C., and/or Auction.com-VA, LLC, Substitute Trustees, Crown Center Building, Suite 600, 580 East Main Street, Norfolk, VA 23510, File No. 241603-01, Tel: (757) 321-6465, between 10:00 a.m. & 12:00 noon only. listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee's Sale 119 SALMON STREET, MARTINSVILLE, VA 24112 (Parcel ID: 000619000) Default having been made in the terms of a certain Deed of Trust dated 8/26/2010, in the original principal amount of $103,626.00 and recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the Martinsville County, Virginia on 8/27/2010, as Instrument No. 1000898, Under Loan Modification Recorded 04/01/2019 Clerk File Number: 190000345, the undersigned Substitute Trustees will sell at public auction on 5/20/2026 at 1:45 PM, At the front steps of the courthouse 55 W. Church Street Martinsville, VA 24112, the property designated as 119 SALMON STREET, MARTINSVILLE, VA 24112. Lot #6, Block Z of the Cabel Acres Development as shown on a survey for George C. Salmons, Jr., et als, prepared by J. A. Gustin and W. C. Trent, Surveyors, dated November 2O, 1950, and re-surveyed by H. S. Pierce which said map is of record in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the City of Martinsville, Virginia in Map Book 2, page 214, and being further shown on Plat of Survey for John B. Williams and Margaret E. Williams, prepared by J. A. Gustin & Associates, dated October 15, 1979, and of record in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Map Book 14, page 219, which said lot is more particularly described as follow, to-wit: BEGINNING at a point on the East side of Salmons Street, which point marks the dividing line between Lots #5 and #6 and running from said beginning point and with said dividing line, North 72 deg. 56 min. East 150 feet to a point on a common back line for a tier of lots; thence with said back line, South 17 deg. 04 min. East 70 feet to a point, which point marks the dividing line between Lots #6 and #7; thence with the last mentioned dividing line, South 72 deg. 56 min. West 150 feet to a point on the East side of Salmons Street, thence with the margin of said Salmons Street North 70 deg. 04 min. West 70 feet to the point of beginning; and being more commonly known as 119 Salmon Street, Martinsville, Virginia in accordance with the numbering system currently utilized by the City of Martinsville; TERMS: CASH. A deposit of $10,362.60 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successful bidder at time of sale. Prior to the sale, interested bidders will be required to register with and must present a bid deposit which may be held during the sale by the trustee. The bid deposit must be certified funds and/or cash, but no more than $9,900.00 of cash will be accepted. The successful bidder's deposit will be retained at the sale and applied to the sale price. If held by the trustee, all other bid deposits will be returned to the unsuccessful bidders. Settlement is to be made within 15 days. The successful bidder will be responsible for obtaining possession of the property, and for all costs and fees related to recording the Trustee's Deed, including the grantors tax. The successful bidder will be required to execute a Memorandum of Trustee's Sale, available for review upon request before the sale, outlining additional terms of sale and settlement. A Trustee's Deed will be prepared by Trustee's attorney at high bidder's expense. This is a communication from a debt collector. Vylla Solutions - Virginia, LLC, 283 Constitution Drive, Suite 102, Office B, Virginia Beach, VA 23462, File No. 24-32314, Tel: 888-313-1969 COL-4800478 CITY OF MARTINSVILLE COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-23

listings.deposit: A deposit of $20,000.00 or 10% of the sales price, whichever is lower, cash or certified check will be
listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee Sale 1022 Jefferson Circle, Martinsville, VA 24112 City of Martinsville In execution of a Deed of Trust in the original principal amount of $118,340.00, dated August 14, 2023 recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the City of Martinsville, Virginia, in Document No. 202300945, at the request of the holder of the Note, the undersigned Substitute Trustee and will offer for sale at public auction at the entrance to the Circuit Court of the City of Martinsville, 55 West Church Street, Martinsville, on May 7, 2026 at 1:30 PM the property described in said deed, located at the above address and briefly described as: Lot 54, Parkview Land Company, Section 2, with any improvements thereon Subject to any and all covenants, conditions, restrictions, easements, and all other matters of record taking priority over the Deed of Trust, if any, affecting the aforesaid property. TERMS OF SALE: CASH: A deposit of $20,000.00 or 10% of the sales price, whichever is lower, cash or certified check will be required at the time of sale, but no more than $9,000.00 of cash will be accepted, with settlement within fifteen (15) days from the date of sale. Sale is subject to post sale confirmation that the borrower did not file for protection under the U.S. Bankruptcy Code prior to the sale which affects the validity of the sale, as well as to post-sale confirmation of the status of the loan with the loan servicer including, but not limited to, determination of whether the borrower entered into any repayment agreement, reinstated or paid off the loan prior to the sale. Sale is also subject to buyer providing Trustee with information needed for reporting requirements required by Federal Law including FinCen requirements (31 CFR Chapter X) within 15 days from date of sale. In any such event, the sale shall be null and void, and the Purchaser’s sole remedy, in law or equity, shall be the return of his deposit without interest. Additional terms may be announced at the time of sale. Pursuant to the Federal Fair Debt Collection Practices Act, we advise you that this firm is a debt collector attempting to collect the indebtedness referred to herein and any information we obtain will be used for that purpose. SAMUEL I. WHITE, P.C., Substitute Trustee This is a communication from a debt collector. FOR INFORMATION CONTACT: SAMUEL I. WHITE, P.C. (95465) 448 Viking Drive Suite 350 Virginia Beach, VA 23452 757-457-1460 - Call Between 9:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m. or visit our website at www.siwpc.net COL-4800500 CITY OF MARTINSVILLE COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-21

Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE’S SALE OF 128 FRANK REDD ROAD, I/R/T/A 618 FRANK REDD ROAD, FIELDALE, VA 24089 In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated September 27, 1999, in the original principal amount of $97,273.00 recorded in the Clerk’s Office, Circuit Court for Henry County, Virginia, in Book 0854 at Page 0016 as Instrument No. 007512. The undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer for sale at public auction in the front of the Circuit Court building for the City of Martinsville, 55 W. Church Street, Martinsville, Virginia, or any such temporary alternative Circuit Court location designated by the Judges of the Circuit Court, on May 27, 2026, at 2:00 PM, the property described in said Deed of Trust, located at the above address, and more particularly described as follows: ALL OF THAT CERTAIN TRACT OR PARCEL OF LAND. TOGETHER WITH ALL IMPROVEMENTS THEREON AND ALL APPURTENANCES THEREUNTO BELONGING SITUATE ONE THE WESTERLY MARGIN OF STALE ROUTE 1810 IN THE BLACKBERRY MAGISTERIAL DISTRICT OF HENRY COUNTY, VIRGINIA AND BEING KNOWN AND DESIGNATED AS CONTAINING 2.000 ACRES AS SHOWN ON PLAT OF SURVEY FOR ARTHUR LEE DANDRIDGE, JR. PREPARED BY LARRY G. RAKES. LLS, DATED JUNE 15. 1999 A COPY OF WHICH PLAT IS RECORDED IN THE HENRY COUNTY CIRCUIT COURT CLERK`S OFFICE IN MAP BOOK 90, PAGE 248. TERMS OF SALE: ALL CASH. A bidder’s deposit of ten percent (10%) of the sale price or ten percent (10%) of the original principal balance of the subject Deed of Trust, whichever is lower, in the form of cash or certified funds payable to the Substitute Trustee must be present at the time of the sale. The balance of the purchase price will be due within fifteen (15) days of sale, otherwise Purchaser’s deposit may be forfeited to Trustee. Time is of the essence. If the sale is set aside for any reason, the Purchaser at the sale shall be entitled to a return of the deposit paid. The Purchaser may, if provided by the terms of the Trustee’s Memorandum of Foreclosure Sale, be entitled to a $50 cancellation fee from the Substitute Trustee, but shall have no further recourse against the Mortgagor, the Mortgagee or the Mortgagee’s attorney. A form copy of the Trustee’s memorandum of foreclosure sale and contract to purchase real property is available for viewing at www.aldridgepite.com. Additional terms, if any, to be announced at the sale and the Purchaser may be given the option to execute the contract of sale electronically. This is a communication from a debt collector and any information obtained will be used for that purpose. The sale is subject to seller confirmation. Substitute Trustee: Equity Trustees, LLC, 8100 Three Chopt Road, Suite 240, Richmond, VA 23229. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact the Virginia Pre-Sale Department of counsel for Equity Trustees, LLC at 301-961-6555, website: www.aldridgepite.com. VA-361159-2. COL-4800494 CITY OF MARTINSVILLE COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-21
